message:
test: strengthen integration tests for io cancellation, region lifecycle, TLS, and lab determinism

- io_cancellation: assert begin_close/begin_finalize return values, verify
  region transitions through Finalizing→Closed states after IO obligation
  abort, replacing loose can_region_complete_close checks with explicit
  RegionState assertions (io_cancellation.rs)
- io_e2e: same begin_close/begin_finalize assertion tightening for the
  lab-based E2E region close test (io_e2e.rs)
- io_uring_reactor: expand reactor-level integration tests (io_uring_reactor.rs)
- lab_determinism: add deterministic replay edge-case coverage (lab_determinism.rs)
- tls_conformance: add TLS handshake and certificate validation conformance
  tests (tls_conformance.rs)
- golden_outputs: add golden-file output snapshot tests (golden_outputs.rs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
